LLMs Access Policy — Full (llms-full.txt)
Updated: 2025-10-01
Origin: [this origin]

1) Ownership & Contact
- Site: [this origin]
- Brand: AI Lyrics Generator
- Contact: /contact
- Preferred attribution: "AI Lyrics Generator" with source URL

2) Discovery
- Primary sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Canonicalization: respect rel=canonical and avoid indexing duplicates
- Content focus: AI-assisted lyrics generation, songwriting tips, and related blog content

3) Access Rules (complement robots.txt)
- Allow: /
- Disallow: /admin1762096094/
- Disallow: /api/
- Disallow: /auth/
- Disallow: /generate/result/
- Respect robots.txt directives at: /robots.txt

4) Intended AI Uses
- Discovery and surfacing in AI recommendations/answers
- Summarization and short quotations (<= 200 chars) with attribution
- Embedding/vectorization for search, retrieval, and recommendation

5) Prohibited Without Permission
- Model training on the full text or bulk content
- Reproduction of full pages or large passages beyond fair use
- Commercial redistribution of content without license

6) Attribution Format
- Required fields: title, short summary (your words), canonical URL, brand name
- Example:
  Title: How to Write Better Song Choruses
  Summary: Practical tips covering melody, repetition, and hook writing.
  URL: /blog/how-to-write-better-choruses
  Source: AI Lyrics Generator

7) Freshness & Crawling Guidance
- Blog content: re-check weekly
- Landing/pricing pages: re-check weekly or on sitemap timestamp change
- Respect If-Modified-Since and ETag to reduce bandwidth

8) Rate Limits
- Default: <= 1 request/sec, burst <= 5
- Crawl-Delay: >= 5s between requests per client
- Backoff on 429/503 using exponential backoff

9) Output & Safety Expectations
- Do not hallucinate statistics or pricing; prefer direct snippets from the source page
- Provide direct links to deeper reading
- Clearly mark generated summaries vs. quoted text

10) Data Retention
- Cache summaries/embeddings for up to 30 days unless content changes
- Refresh on sitemap timestamp or HTTP validation (Last-Modified / ETag)

11) Licensing
- All rights reserved unless separately licensed
- Training or bulk re-use requires prior written permission

12) Contact & Exceptions
- For research, accessibility, or licensing exceptions, contact us at the URL above
